title: pilosella schultesii subsp. megalophylla
intro: Pilosella schultesii subsp. megalophylla, also known as a subspecies of the common dandelion, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella schultesii subsp. megalophylla include potential uses in treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
